CustomField.description: Help field for the power automate integration
CustomField.formula: TRIM( Admincontact__r.Email & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(AdminContact2__r.Email)), "; " & AdminContact2__r.Email, "") & IF(NOT(ISBLANK(AdminContact3__r.Email)), "; " & AdminContact3__r.Email, "") )
CustomField.label: Admin contact email addresses
